Patch Set 3:

(3 comments)

npages_read can be 0 and rc < 0 if the read failed (doesn't have to be a short read).
rc will be overwritten by tgt_checksum_niobuf_rw as it will safely calculate a CRC over 0 bytes and return success.

Patch Set 3: Code-Review-1

(1 comment)

during tgt_brw_read it is impossible to get negative at local_lnb[i].lnb_rc

Abandoned

in favor of https://review.whamcloud.com/#/c/45273/

parents.subject: LU-12946 kernel: fix to handle BLK_MQ_RQ_QUEUE_DEV_BUSY event

commit.subject: LU-12954 ofd: use after free in tgt_brw_read
commit.message:
LU-12954 ofd: use after free in tgt_brw_read

check_read_checksum can be passed get an invalid 'npages_read'
and can read into an invalid memory location if npages_read == 0.

Signed-off-by: Shaun Tancheff <stancheff@cray.com>
Change-Id: I5d72fcc0ea8d96931ff72afd38c8eb7281061438
